016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test;
017
018import java.util.Random;
019
020/**
021 * Utilities for integration testing server-side wallets
022 */
023public class WalletTestUtil {
024
025    /**
026     * Generate a valid, random wallet name. This is useful in integration testing.
027     *
028     * @return A wallet name of the form: <i>testwallet</i>-<i>ten-randomChars</i>
029     */
030    public static String randomWalletName() {
031        return randomWalletName("testwallet", 10);
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Generate a valid, random wallet name. This is useful in integration testing.
036     *
037     * @param prefix Prefix, e.g. {@code "testwallet"}
038     * @param numRandomChars The number of random characters to add to the prefix
039     * @return A wallet name of the form: <i>prefix</i>-<i>randomChars</i>
040     */
041    public static String randomWalletName(String prefix, int numRandomChars) {
042        return String.format("%s-%s", prefix, generateRandomName(numRandomChars));
043    }
044
045    static String generateRandomName(int targetStringLength) {
046        int leftLimit = 97;     // letter 'a'
047        int rightLimit = 122;   // letter 'z'
048        Random random = new Random();
049
050        return random.ints(leftLimit, rightLimit + 1)
051                .limit(targetStringLength)
052                .collect(StringBuilder::new, StringBuilder::appendCodePoint, StringBuilder::append)
053                .toString();
054    }
055}
